title: Compare parked BLACKOUT Foundation v2 with the owner UI review
goal: Classify the parked BLACKOUT Foundation v2 work into salvage, rework, and discard buckets using the owner's 33-comment UI plan as the authority. Do not recommend a wholesale merge or revert.
expected_output: Return three concise buckets: SALVAGE with exact components/commits and why they serve specific UIR tasks; REWORK with the rejected behavior to remove; DISCARD/PARK with conflicts against owner comments. End with the smallest safe PR sequence. Cite repository paths and commit IDs.
